summary: Verified bug fix: Season filter no longer affects financial components. Cash Book balance remains SAME when switching from Kharif to Rabi season. Code review confirmed season parameter removed from all financial component fetch calls.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Season filter was resetting Cash Balance and financial data to 0 when switching seasons
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Season filter removed from GET/fetch API calls in all financial components

cash_book_season_test.result: PASS - Balance remained SAME after season switch

mill_entries_season_filter.description: Mill Entries page still shows season filter (operational component)
mill_entries_season_filter.result: PASS - Season filter retained for operational components

CashBook.jsx.fetchData: Season NOT included in params - only kms_year

critical_code_review_comments: Season filter correctly removed from all financial component fetch calls
Season is still passed in POST/PUT payloads for metadata (correct behavior)
Operational components (Mill Entries, Milling, DC Tracker, Paddy Purchase) still use season filter (correct behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: Season filter no longer affects financial components (Cash Book, Ledgers, Payments, FY Summary). Switching between Kharif and Rabi seasons keeps financial data intact. FY 2025-2026 has test data with 96 transactions and balance of Rs.-2,62,218. Version is v88.39.0.
